results.title: Padma Shri honoree Savita Punia reflects on Hockey journey, eyes World Cup gold
results.description: New Delhi: Padma Shri awardee and Indian hockey goalkeeper Savita Punia expressed happiness and pride over her journey in hockey, recalling how she was once afraid to step out of her house and viewed playing the sport as an impossible dream. She described visiting Rashtrapati Bhavan with her family as a deeply meaningful moment.
